zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Halle III於1352年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉德福--阿文時，他的父親Thomas Halle II32歲，母親Lady Edith de la Salle26歲。他於1382年與Alice Atford在英國維爾爾布拉德福--阿文結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1430年在英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉德福--阿文享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Halle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Rejean, Marcel, Andre, Arianne, Armand, Camille, Fernand, Gaspard, Laurent.
German and English: variant of   Hall  .
French (also Hallé): topographic name from Old French halle ‘covered market’, from halla ‘covered room’.

variants.name: Hall
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, German, Norwegian, and Danish: from Middle English hall (Old English heall), Middle High German halle, Old Norse hǫll all meaning ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a hall or an occupational name for a servant employed at a hall. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, which in some parts of Germany and Austria in the Middle Ages also denoted a salt mine. Hall is one of the commonest and most widely distributed of English surnames, bearing witness to the importance of the hall as a feature of the medieval village. The English surname has been established in Ireland since the 14th century, and, according to MacLysaght, has become numerous in Ulster since the 17th century.
Swedish: ornamental or topographic name from hall ‘hall’ (a spacious residence), or a habitational name from a placename containing the element hall ‘rock’ (from Old Norse hallr).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何 and 賀, see   He   1 and 2.

variants.name: Hallee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Armand, Fernand, Henri, Napoleon, Renald, Urbain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Halle III was born in 1352, in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Halle II, was 32 and his mother, Lady Edith de la Salle, was 26. He married Alice Atford in 1382, in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1430, in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, U: Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Halle III est né en 1352, à Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Halle II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Edith de la Salle, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Atford en 1382, à Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1430, à Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, U: Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Halle III 1352 in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Halle II 32 und seine Mutter Lady Edith de la Salle 26. Er hat 1382 in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England Alice Atford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1430 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Halle III è nato il nel 1352 nel Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Halle II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Edith de la Salle, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Atford nel 1382, nel Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1430, nel Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 코브 비 아메스버이
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Halle III(이)가 1352년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 브래드퍼드--아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Halle II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Edith de la Salle(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1382년 영국 윌츠히르 브래드퍼드--아폰에서 Alice Atford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 브래드퍼드--아폰에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Halle III nasceu em 1352, em Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Halle II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Edith de la Salle, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Atford em 1382, em Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1430, em Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.Combe by Amesbury, Wiltshire, England, U: комб би амесбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Halle III родился в 1352 г. в местности брадфорд-он-авон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Halle II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Edith de la Salle, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Atford в 1382 г. в местности брадфорд-он-авон, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1430 г. в местности брадфорд-он-авон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Halle III nació en 1352, en Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Halle II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Edith de la Salle, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Atford en 1382, en Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1430, en Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
